title: Receiving payroll correspondence from the CRA - Canada.ca
content:
## Receiving payroll correspondence from the CRA
Select the link in the following table to learn more about the specific type of payroll correspondence you may receive from the CRA.
Type of correspondence
Pensionable and insurable earnings review (PIER)
Tax deduction, CPP and EI discrepancy notice
Notice of assessment
Statement of account for current source deductions – Regular and quarterly remitters
Statement of account for current source deductions – Accelerated remitters
Remittance voucher booklets for accelerated remitters
Remittance voucher for Payment on Filing (PoF) Source Deductions
Request for tax deductions, CPP and EI information if you remit late
Statement of account and partial payment for arrears balance remittance voucher
Statement of account and payment on existing balance remittance voucher
Accelerated remitter notification and questionnaire

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
